evidence.raw_snippet:
PubMed ID: 17654921. 2007/06/01 00:00. PURPOSE: The commercially available brachytherapy treatment-planning systems 
today, usually neglects the attenuation effect from stainless steel (SS) tube 
when Fletcher-Suit-Delclos (FSD) is used in treatment of cervical and 
endometrial cancers. This could lead to potential inaccuracies in computing 
dwell times and dose distribution. A more accurate analysis quantifying the 
level of attenuation for high-dose-rate (HDR) iridium 192 radionuclide ((192)Ir
